  1. Trier /
  2. Restaurants

Restaurants in Trier

From wine taverns in Olewig to fine-dining tables at the Hauptmarkt, a curated map of where to eat in Trier.

Michelin-starred
Upscale

Olewig

Becker's Restaurant

Michelin-starred restaurant run by the Becker family in Olewig (a wine village within Trier). Modern cuisine, estate wines, wine-led pairings.

Mediterranean-Regional
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Schlemmereule

Set in the cathedral cellar on the Domfreihof. Mediterranean accents on a regional foundation.

Bistro
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bagatelle

Charming bistro with a French slant on Zuckerbergstraße.

Regional / Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Weinstube Kesselstatt

Classic wine tavern on Liebfrauenplatz. Regional cooking, Mosel wines, and a wonderful terrace.

Regional / Roman
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Zum Domstein

Restaurant built over a Roman wine press. Regional cuisine plus historical Roman menus.

Regional
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Kartoffelkiste

A Trier classic built around potato dishes. Family-friendly, generous portions, cozy.

Modern Regional
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Pfeffermühle

Restaurant with a modern take on Moselle cuisine in the Zurlauben fishermen's quarter.

Modern
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bei Joh und Otto

Young restaurant with modern cuisine, a short menu, and a thoughtful wine selection.

Winery / Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weingut Reverchon

Winery with a courtyard wine tavern. Estate wines plus Moselle platters, tarte flambée, and winemaker's bread.

Winery / Straußwirtschaft
Budget

Olewig

Weingut Rummel

A classic Olewig Straußwirtschaft (seasonal tavern run by a winery). Estate wine, a simple menu, and a local atmosphere.

Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weinstube Palais Kesselstatt (Olewig)

The wine tavern of Weingut Kesselstatt, with tastings and a small menu.

Wine House
Mid-range

Olewig

Trierer Weinhaus

A local classic in Olewig. Well-curated Mosel wine list and simple regional dishes.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Ristorante L'Osteria

Italian chain serving oversized pizzas on the Hauptmarkt. Reliable and family-friendly.

Italian
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Ristorante La Bottega

Ambitious Italian on Glockenstraße. Seasonal menu and a good wine list.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Pizzeria Donna Margherita

Small pizzeria on Sichelstraße. Wood-fired Neapolitan pizza at fair prices.

Italian
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Vapiano Trier

Italian chain with live-cooking stations on the Viehmarkt.

Japanese / Sushi
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Akito Sushi

Sushi spot on Bruchhausenstraße. Fresh fish, fair prices, delivery available.

Vietnamese
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bambus

Small Vietnamese restaurant. Pho, bun bo nam bo, and summer rolls.

Thai
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Saigon

Thai cuisine on Brückenstraße. Curries, glass noodles, and heat to order.

Bistro
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Bistro Quo Vadis

Bistro with a rotating daily menu and a solid wine list on Stockplatz.

Café & Bistro
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Lieblingsstube

Café-bistro serving breakfast all day. Homemade cakes and a small hot menu.

Burgers
Mid-range

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Burgerlich

Burger spot offering several patty options, a fries menu, and craft beer.

Modern
Upscale

Innenstadt (Old Town)

Tabula Rasa

Young, modern restaurant with rotating menus and bold flavors.

Wine Tavern
Mid-range

Olewig

Weinstube Friedrich-Wilhelm-Gymnasium

The foundation-run wine tavern of the FWG school. Wines from estate vineyards in a classic Trier setting.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
